Job Safety Analysis (JSA)

AI-Powered JSA System for Offshore Accommodation Work Barges

Basic Information

Risk Assessment Matrix

Severity (S)A
Very Low
>10 Years		B
Low
Annually		C
Medium
6 Monthly		D
High
Monthly		E
Very High
Daily
1 - Insignificant
Injury (onsite treatment)
LOWLOWLOWLOWLOW
2 - Minor
1st aid treatment
LOWLOWLOWLOWMED
3 - Serious
Recordable injury
LOWLOWMEDMEDMED
4 - Extensive
LTI (Lost Time Injury)
MEDMEDHIGHHIGHHIGH
5 - FatalityHIGHHIGHHIGHHIGHHIGH
LOW RISK

Acceptable but Tool Box Talk to be conducted to see if risk can be further reduced. If working alone Personal Risk Assessment to be carried out before starting the work.

MEDIUM RISK

Only proceed with express authorisation of Master or responsible manager after full JSA carried out with all parties involved. Wherever possible the risk should be further reduced prior to the task being carried out. Proceed with the utmost caution.

HIGH RISK

Task must not proceed under normal circumstances.

Definitions:
S = Potential Severity
L = Likelihood of Occurrence
IR = Initial Risk
RR = Residual Risk

Chevron Energy Wheel - Hazard Categories

Click on each category to view specific hazards and examples

Energy Categories

Total Hazards

Work Examples
100%
Offshore Coverage

About JSA System

AI-powered Job Safety Analysis platform designed specifically for offshore accommodation work barges, utilizing Chevron Energy Wheel methodology.

Features

  • • AI-powered hazard identification
  • • Chevron Energy Wheel framework
  • • Automated risk assessment
  • • Word document export

Safety Standards

  • • ISO 45001 aligned
  • • Offshore industry best practices
  • • Company risk matrix compliant
  • • Continuous improvement focused

© 2026 JSA System. Built for offshore safety excellence.
